TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Alvin_(actor), title = John_Alvin_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Alvin_(actor)} }

S.FORM: John Alvin kawas tay 1917, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 10, John Alvin, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
John Alvin kawas tay 1917, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 10, John Alvin, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *oħn al*in kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *oħn al*in, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
